name: Airplanes
instructions: Lie face down with your arms stretched out to the sides.
Raise your arms as high off the ground as you can, initiating the movement from your shoulders.
Slowly return to the starting position.
source: NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Strength Exercises - Body Weight - Upper Body)

name: Crunches
instructions: Lie on the ground with your knees bent and place your fingertips by your ears.
Engage your core enough for your shoulder blades to lift off the floor.
Lower back down with control.
source: NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Strength Exercises - Body Weight - Upper Body)

name: Abdominal Crunch
instructions: Lie on your back with knees bent and feet flat on the floor.
Cross your arms over your chest or place fingertips by your ears.
Curl your shoulder blades up off the floor, then lower with control.
source: WebMD 7-Minute Workout (Scientific 7-Minute Workout / HICT, Klika & Jordan ACSM 2013 fallback). Distinct from NOOM 'Crunches' only in measurement (timed 30s station).

name: Plank
instructions: Stack your shoulders over your elbows, over your wrists, and spread your fingers wide.
Squeeze your core and keep your body in a straight line.
Do not round or arch your back. Hold.
modifications: Drop to your knees for extra support.
source: NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Strength Exercises - Body Weight); also WebMD 7-Minute Workout

name: Plank Presses
instructions: Start in a pushup position.
Lower yourself to a forearm plank, dropping down one elbow at a time.
Return to a pushup position one arm at a time.
Alternate the leading hand and keep your core tight.
source: NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Strength Exercises - Body Weight - Upper Body)

name: Plank Twists
instructions: Start in a plank position.
Keeping your core tight, twist each hip toward the ground, alternating back and forth.
source: NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Strength Exercises - Body Weight - Upper Body)

name: Push-up
instructions: Stack your shoulders over your elbows, over your wrists, and spread your fingers wide.
Squeeze your core and keep your body in a straight line; do not round or arch your back.
Keep your elbows close to your body as you bend them and lower toward the floor.
Push through the palms of your hands to return to the starting position.
modifications: Place your hands on a higher surface, such as the edge of a table or a wall.
Drop to your knees.
source: NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Strength Exercises - Body Weight - Upper Body); also WebMD 7-Minute Workout

name: Push-up with Rotation
instructions: Perform a standard push-up.
At the top, rotate your body into a side plank, extending one arm toward the ceiling.
Return to the push-up position and repeat, alternating sides.
modifications: Drop to your knees for the push-up portion.
source: WebMD 7-Minute Workout (Scientific 7-Minute Workout / HICT, Klika & Jordan ACSM 2013 fallback)

name: Shoulder Taps
instructions: Start in a plank position with your core tight and your hips parallel to the ground.
Alternate tapping your right hand to your left shoulder and your left hand to your right shoulder.
source: NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Strength Exercises - Body Weight - Upper Body)

name: Sit Ups
instructions: Lie on the ground with your knees bent and cross your arms over your chest.
Keep your spine straight and squeeze your core as you sit up to touch your elbows to your knees.
Lower with control.
source: NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Strength Exercises - Body Weight - Upper Body)

name: Side Plank
instructions: Distribute your weight between your forearm and the side of your foot.
Squeeze your core so that your body is in a straight line.
Hold.
modifications: Lower your bottom knee to the ground for extra support.
source: NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Strength Exercises - Body Weight - Upper Body); also WebMD 7-Minute Workout

name: Supermans
instructions: Lie face down with your arms stretched forward.
Raise your arms (and legs) as high off the ground as you can, initiating the movement from your shoulders.
Slowly return to the starting position.
source: NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Strength Exercises - Body Weight - Upper Body)

name: Tricep Dips
instructions: Sit on a chair, box, bench, or step and place your hands on either side of you, gripping the seat.
Extend your legs out in front of you and lift your butt off the seat.
Keep your shoulders back and elbows in as you bend your elbows and lower your body toward the ground.
Push through the palms of your hands to return to hover above your seat.
modifications: Bend your knees and keep feet closer to make it easier.
source: NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Strength Exercises - Body Weight - Upper Body); also WebMD 7-Minute Workout (triceps dip on chair)

name: V-Sits
instructions: Start with your body in a "V" position.
Slowly lower your upper and lower body toward (but not touching) the ground.
Keep your spine straight and squeeze your core to return to the starting position.
source: NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Strength Exercises - Body Weight - Upper Body)

name: Calf Raises
instructions: Stand tall with your weight in the balls of your feet so your heels are slightly lifted.
With control, lift your heels fully off the ground so you are standing on your toes.
Lower your heels back to the starting position.
source: NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Strength Exercises - Body Weight - Lower Body)

name: Curtsy Lunges
instructions: From a standing position, step one foot back across your body at a 45-degree angle from your planted foot.
Lower your back knee to hover about 2 inches above the ground.
Push through your planted heel to return to the starting position and alternate legs.
source: NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Strength Exercises - Body Weight - Lower Body)

name: Forward Lunges
instructions: From a standing position, step one foot about 2 feet forward.
Lower your back knee to hover about 2 inches above the ground.
Push through your front heel to return to the starting position and alternate legs.
source: NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Strength Exercises - Body Weight - Lower Body); also WebMD 7-Minute Workout (lunge)

name: Glute Bridges
instructions: Lie on the ground with your knees bent and your arms by your side.
Push through your heels and squeeze your glutes to raise your hips as high as possible.
Return to the starting position.
source: NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Strength Exercises - Body Weight - Lower Body)

name: Side Lunges
instructions: From a standing position with your toes pointing forward, step one foot out to your side about 2 feet.
Sit your hips backward to initiate a bend at the knee until your thigh reaches as close to parallel to the ground as possible.
Return to the starting position and alternate sides.
source: NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Strength Exercises - Body Weight - Lower Body)

name: Reverse Lunges
instructions: From a standing position, step one foot back about 2 feet.
Lower your back knee to hover about 2 inches above the ground.
Push through your front heel to return to the starting position and alternate legs.
source: NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Strength Exercises - Body Weight - Lower Body)

name: Single Leg Deadlift
instructions: From a standing position with your knees slightly bent and arms in front of your body, put your weight in one leg.
Keep your back as straight as possible and bend at your hips so your upper body moves forward and your lifted leg moves backward, eventually both parallel to the ground in a "T" position.
Return slowly to the starting position and alternate legs.
source: NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Strength Exercises - Body Weight - Lower Body)

name: Single Leg Glute Bridges
instructions: Lie on the ground with your knees bent and your arms by your side.
Raise one leg about six inches off the ground.
Squeeze your glutes and push through the heel of the planted foot to raise your hips as high as possible.
Return to the starting position.
source: NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Strength Exercises - Body Weight - Lower Body)

name: Squats
instructions: With your feet shoulder-width apart and facing forward, sit your hips back and bend your knees.
Get your thighs as close to parallel to the ground as possible.
Push through your heels to return to the starting position.
source: NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Strength Exercises - Body Weight - Lower Body); also WebMD 7-Minute Workout (squat)

name: Step Ups
instructions: Plant one foot on a box, step, chair, or bench.
Keep your body in a straight line and press through the heel of this foot to step up onto the platform.
Return with control to the starting position.
source: NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Strength Exercises - Body Weight - Lower Body); also WebMD 7-Minute Workout (step-up onto chair)

name: Straight Leg Deadlift
instructions: From a standing position with your knees slightly bent and arms in front of your body, bend at your hips until your upper body is parallel to the ground.
Keep your back straight, your weight in your heels, and your hands grazing the front of your legs.
Reach your butt as far back as possible, then return to standing.
source: NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Strength Exercises - Body Weight - Lower Body)

name: Split Squats
instructions: Raise one foot onto a box, step, chair, or bench about 2 feet behind you.
Keep your body in a straight line and your weight in your front heel.
Bend your front knee as you squat toward the ground, then push through your front heel to return to the starting position.
source: NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Strength Exercises - Body Weight - Lower Body)

name: Walking Lunges
instructions: Step one foot about 2 feet forward and lower your back knee to hover about 2 inches above the ground.
Transfer your weight to the front leg and push through your front heel as you bring your back foot to join the front foot.
Take the next step forward with the alternate leg.
source: NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Strength Exercises - Body Weight - Lower Body)

name: Wall Sit
instructions: Stand with your back against a wall and walk your feet out in front of you.
Slide down until your thighs are parallel to the ground, knees over ankles.
Hold the position for time.
modifications: Do not slide as low to reduce difficulty.
source: NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Strength - Lower Body Burn Out, 'Wall Sit (hold for time)'); also WebMD 7-Minute Workout (wall sit)

name: Bear Crawls
instructions: From down on all fours, lift your knees slightly off the ground so only your hands and feet contact the ground.
Place your right hand and left foot slightly ahead and plant them down.
Then bring your left hand and right foot slightly ahead. Continue crawling forward.
source: NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Cardio + Dynamic Exercises)

name: Box Jumps
instructions: Place a box, step, or bench in front of you.
Bend your knees slightly before jumping up to land on the platform.
Step back down before beginning once more.
modifications: Start with a low platform and work your way up.
cautions: Advanced, high-impact move -- start small and work your way up.
source: NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Cardio + Dynamic Exercises)

name: Burpees
instructions: From a standing position, drop down into a ball, then jump your feet back behind you to land in a pushup position.
Jump your feet back in and jump up to reach the sky.
For an extra challenge, drop your whole body to the floor when you jump your feet back, then pick it back up.
modifications: Step your feet back and in instead of jumping; omit the floor drop.
source: NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Cardio + Dynamic Exercises)

name: Butt Kicks
instructions: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and transfer your weight into one foot.
Lift your other foot off the ground as you drive your heel toward your butt.
Bring the foot back down and repeat on the other side, alternating in a running motion.
source: NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Cardio + Dynamic Exercises)

name: Drop Squats
instructions: Stand with your feet close together and your arms in front of your body.
Jump your feet out slightly further than shoulder-width apart and sit your hips back to a squat position as your arms drop to touch the floor.
Push through your heels to jump back to the starting position.
source: NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Cardio + Dynamic Exercises)

name: Forward Skips
instructions: Stagger your feet about 2 feet apart and shoulder-width, with one foot in front of the other.
Transfer your weight into the front foot and push through your heel as you drive your back knee up and forward to skip forward.
As that foot lands, bend your knee and push through your heel to drive your back foot to skip forward.
source: NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Cardio + Dynamic Exercises)

name: High Knees
instructions: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and transfer your weight into one foot.
Lift your other foot off the ground as you drive your knee toward your chest.
Bring the foot back down and repeat on the other side in a running motion.
modifications: March in place instead of running for lower impact.
source: NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Cardio + Dynamic Exercises); also WebMD 7-Minute Workout (high knees running in place)

name: Inch Worms
instructions: Stand in a forward fold and touch your palms to the ground in front of you.
Keep your core tight as you walk your hands out one at a time to a pushup position.
Slowly walk your feet toward your hands one at a time to return to a forward fold.
source: NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Cardio + Dynamic Exercises)

name: Jump Rope
instructions: Keep a slight bend in your knees as you skip rope to cushion your landings.
modifications: Mimic the motion without a rope (imaginary jump rope).
source: NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Cardio + Dynamic Exercises)

name: Jumping Lunges
instructions: From a standing position, step one foot back about 2 feet and lower your back knee to hover about 2 inches above the ground.
Push through your feet to jump up in the air, bringing your back foot forward and your front foot back.
Bend your knees as you land in a lunge position on the opposite side.
modifications: Perform alternating reverse lunges without the jump.
source: NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Cardio + Dynamic Exercises)

name: Jumping Jacks
instructions: Stand with your feet close together and your arms at the sides of your body.
Jump your feet out slightly further than shoulder-width apart as your arms go up and out to make a star.
Jump back to the starting position.
modifications: Step one foot out at a time (step jacks) for lower impact.
source: NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Cardio + Dynamic Exercises); also WebMD 7-Minute Workout (jumping jacks)

name: Long Jumps
instructions: From a standing position, swing your arms behind you and bend your knees slightly.
Push through your heels as you propel your arms out in front of you to jump forward.
Bend your knees as you land and swing your arms back to the starting position.
source: NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Cardio + Dynamic Exercises)

name: Lateral Jumps
instructions: From a standing position, jump to one side as far as you can.
Land on your outside leg as you let the opposite leg swing behind it.
Swing your lifted leg back toward the center as you jump to land on this leg, swinging your other foot behind.
source: NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Cardio + Dynamic Exercises)

name: Mountain Climbers
instructions: Stack your shoulders over your elbows, over your wrists, and spread your fingers wide.
Squeeze your core and keep your back straight.
Drive one knee at a time toward your nose, almost 'running' on the ground.
source: NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Cardio + Dynamic Exercises)

name: Plank Jacks
instructions: Stack your shoulders over your elbows, over your wrists, and spread your fingers wide.
Squeeze your core as you jump your feet out and in, slightly further than hips-width to touching.
modifications: Step your feet out and in instead of jumping.
source: NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Cardio + Dynamic Exercises)

name: Side Shuffles
instructions: Start in a squat position and reach one foot out further to the side.
Transfer your weight into this leading foot and push through your heel to shuffle your other foot toward it.
Reach your leading foot out once more and continue shuffling.
source: NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Cardio + Dynamic Exercises)

name: Sprints
instructions: Keep your upper body upright and your elbows in.
Use your arms to help propel your body forward as you run at maximum effort.
modifications: Run at a sub-maximal pace; use a power walk instead.
source: NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Cardio + Dynamic Exercises)

name: Squat Jumps
instructions: With your feet shoulder-width apart and facing forward, sit your hips back and bend your knees to get your thighs as close to parallel as possible.
Push through your heels to jump up and lift your feet off the ground.
Bend your knees to soften your landing as you return to the squat position.
modifications: Perform bodyweight squats without the jump.
source: NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Cardio + Dynamic Exercises)

name: Toe Taps
instructions: Place a small step or platform about 1 foot in front of you.
Alternate between tapping your right toes and left toes on the platform.
source: NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Cardio + Dynamic Exercises)

name: Star Jacks
instructions: Start in a ball on the floor (crouched low).
Push through your heels to explode up into a star position in the air.
Land softly and return to the starting ball position.
source: NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Cardio + Dynamic Exercises)

name: Calf Stretch
instructions: Stand at arm's length from a wall or a piece of sturdy exercise equipment.
Put your right foot behind your left foot.
Slowly bend your left leg forward, keeping your right knee straight and your right heel on the floor.
Hold your back straight and your hips forward; don't rotate your feet inward or outward.
Hold for about 30 seconds, then switch legs and repeat.
modifications: To deepen the stretch, slightly bend your right knee as you bend your left leg forward.
source: Mayo Clinic 'A guide to basic stretches' (Calf stretch); category also appears in NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Stretches - Regular - Calves)

name: Hamstring Stretch
instructions: Lie on the floor near the outer corner of a wall or a door frame so your left leg is next to the wall.
Raise your left leg and rest your left heel against the wall, keeping your left knee slightly bent.
Gently straighten your left leg until you feel a stretch along the back of your left thigh.
Hold for about 30 seconds, then switch legs and repeat.
modifications: As flexibility increases, scoot closer to the wall or door frame to deepen the stretch.
source: Mayo Clinic 'A guide to basic stretches' (Hamstring stretch); category also appears in NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Stretches - Regular - Hamstrings)

name: Quadriceps Stretch
instructions: Stand near a wall or a piece of sturdy exercise equipment for support.
Grasp your ankle and gently pull your heel up and back until you feel a stretch in the front of your thigh.
Tighten your abdominal muscles to prevent your stomach from sagging outward, and keep your knees close together.
Hold for about 30 seconds, then switch legs and repeat.
source: Mayo Clinic 'A guide to basic stretches' (Quadriceps stretch); category also appears in NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Stretches - Regular - Quadriceps)

name: Hip Flexor Stretch
instructions: Kneel on your right knee, using a folded towel to cushion your kneecap.
Place your left foot in front of you, bending your knee and placing your left hand on your left leg for stability.
Place your right hand on your right hip to avoid bending at your waist; keep your back straight and abs tight.
Lean forward, shifting more body weight onto your front leg until you feel a stretch in your right thigh.
Hold for about 30 seconds, then switch legs and repeat.
source: Mayo Clinic 'A guide to basic stretches' (Hip flexor stretch); category 'Hips' also appears in NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Stretches - Regular)

name: Iliotibial Band (ITB) Stretch
instructions: Stand near a wall or a piece of sturdy exercise equipment for support.
Cross your left leg over your right leg at the ankle.
Extend your left arm overhead, reaching toward your right side until you feel a stretch along your left hip.
Hold for about 30 seconds, then switch sides and repeat.
source: Mayo Clinic 'A guide to basic stretches' (Iliotibial band stretch)

name: Knee-to-Chest Stretch
instructions: Lie on your back on a firm surface with the backs of your heels flat on the floor (or knees bent, feet flat).
Gently pull one knee up toward your chest until you feel a stretch in your lower back.
Bring your knee as close to your chest as comfortably possible; keep your other leg relaxed.
Hold for about 30 seconds (in the back routine, hold ~5 seconds and press your spine to the floor), then switch legs and repeat.
In the 15-minute back routine, also repeat with both knees at the same time.
modifications: Keep the resting leg bent with foot flat if a straight leg is uncomfortable.
cautions: If you have osteoporosis, avoid this stretch -- it may increase the risk of compression fractures in the back bones.
source: Mayo Clinic 'A guide to basic stretches' (Knee-to-chest stretch, 30s) and Mayo Clinic 'Back exercises in 15 minutes a day' (Knee-to-chest stretch, 5s hold, 2-3 reps, single then both legs). Osteoporosis caution from basic-stretches guide.

name: Shoulder Stretch
instructions: Bring your left arm across your body and hold it with your right arm, either above or below the elbow.
Hold for about 30 seconds.
Switch arms and repeat.
source: Mayo Clinic 'A guide to basic stretches' (Shoulder stretch); category also appears in NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Stretches - Regular - Shoulders)

name: Shoulder Stretch with Towel
instructions: Grasp a rolled-up towel firmly with both hands, one hand high behind your head and the other low behind your back.
Gently pull the towel upward with your top hand; you'll feel a stretch in the shoulder of your opposite (lower) arm.
Hold for about 30 seconds, then switch hands and repeat.
source: Mayo Clinic 'A guide to basic stretches' (Shoulder stretch with towel)

name: Neck Stretch
instructions: Bend your head forward and slightly to the right.
With your right hand, gently pull your head downward; you'll feel an easy stretch along the back left side of your neck.
Hold for about 30 seconds, then switch sides and repeat.
source: Mayo Clinic 'A guide to basic stretches' (Neck stretch); category also appears in NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Stretches - Regular - Neck)

name: Lower Back Rotational Stretch
instructions: Lie on your back with your knees bent and your feet flat on the floor.
Keep your shoulders firmly on the floor and slowly roll your bent knees to one side.
Hold for 5 to 10 seconds, then slowly return to the starting position.
Repeat on the other side.
source: Mayo Clinic 'Back exercises in 15 minutes a day' (Lower back rotational stretch)

name: Lower Back Flexibility Exercise (Pelvic Tilt)
instructions: Lie on your back with your knees bent and your feet flat on the floor.
Tighten the muscles in your belly so your lower back pulls up, away from the floor; hold for five seconds and relax.
Flatten your back, pulling your bellybutton toward the floor; hold for five seconds and relax.
Repeat.
source: Mayo Clinic 'Back exercises in 15 minutes a day' (Lower back flexibility exercise; start with 5 reps, work up to 30)

name: Bridge Exercise
instructions: Lie on your back with your knees bent and your feet flat on the floor.
Keep your shoulders and head relaxed on the floor and tighten the muscles in your belly and buttocks.
Raise your hips to form a straight line from your knees to your shoulders.
Hold long enough to take three deep breaths, then return to the start and repeat.
source: Mayo Clinic 'Back exercises in 15 minutes a day' (Bridge exercise; hold for 3 deep breaths, start with 5 reps, work up to 30)

name: Cat Stretch (Cat-Cow)
instructions: Kneel on your knees and hands.
Slowly arch your back, pulling your belly up toward the ceiling as you bring your head down.
Then slowly let your back and belly sag toward the floor as you bring your head up.
Return to the starting position and repeat.
source: Mayo Clinic 'Back exercises in 15 minutes a day' (Cat stretch; 3-5 reps twice a day). Distinct from the yoga 'Cat'/'Cow' poses.

name: Seated Lower Back Rotational Stretch
instructions: Sit on an armless chair or a stool. Cross your right leg over your left leg.
Brace your left elbow against the outside of your right knee, then twist and stretch to the side.
Hold for 10 seconds, then repeat on the opposite side.
source: Mayo Clinic 'Back exercises in 15 minutes a day' (Seated lower back rotational stretch; 3-5 times each side twice a day)

name: Shoulder Blade Squeeze
instructions: Sit on an armless chair or a stool, sitting up straight.
Pull your shoulder blades together.
Hold for five seconds and then relax.
source: Mayo Clinic 'Back exercises in 15 minutes a day' (Shoulder blade squeeze; 3-5 times twice a day)

name: Child's Pose
instructions: Kneel on the mat and sit your hips back toward your heels.
Fold your torso forward and extend your arms out in front of you, resting your forehead toward the mat.
source: NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Stretches - Yoga - Child's Pose)

name: Table Top
instructions: Come onto all fours with your hands stacked under your shoulders and your knees under your hips.
Keep your back flat and your core engaged.
source: NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Stretches - Yoga - Table Top)

name: Cat (Yoga)
instructions: From table top, exhale and round your spine toward the ceiling.
Tuck your chin toward your chest and draw your belly up.
source: NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Stretches - Yoga - Cat)

name: Cow (Yoga)
instructions: From table top, inhale and drop your belly toward the mat.
Lift your chest and gaze upward, arching your back gently.
source: NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Stretches - Yoga - Cow)

name: Downward Dog
instructions: From all fours, tuck your toes and lift your hips up and back to form an inverted V.
Press your hands into the mat and lengthen your spine, reaching your heels toward the floor.
modifications: Keep a slight bend in the knees if hamstrings are tight.
source: NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Stretches - Yoga - Downward Dog)

name: Forward Fold
instructions: From standing, hinge at your hips and fold your torso forward over your legs.
Let your head and arms hang toward the floor; keep a soft bend in the knees as needed.
modifications: Bend your knees generously to protect the lower back.
source: NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Stretches - Yoga - Forward Fold)

name: Halfway Lift
instructions: From a forward fold, place your hands on your shins and lift your torso halfway up.
Lengthen your spine so your back is flat and parallel to the floor.
source: NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Stretches - Yoga - Halfway Lift)

name: Chair Pose
instructions: From standing, bend your knees and sit your hips back as if sitting into a chair.
Raise your arms overhead and keep your weight in your heels.
source: NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Stretches - Yoga - Chair)

name: Plank (Yoga)
instructions: Come to a high plank with shoulders stacked over wrists and your body in a straight line.
Engage your core and hold.
modifications: Drop to your knees.
source: NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Stretches - Yoga - Plank)

name: Chaturanga
instructions: From a high plank, shift forward onto your toes and bend your elbows to lower halfway down.
Keep your elbows hugged into your sides and your body in a straight line.
modifications: Lower your knees to the mat first.
source: NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Stretches - Yoga - Chaturanga)

name: Upward Dog
instructions: From chaturanga, straighten your arms and roll over your toes, lifting your chest and thighs off the mat.
Draw your shoulders back and gaze forward and slightly up.
source: NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Stretches - Yoga - Upward Dog)

name: Mountain Pose
instructions: Stand tall with your feet together and arms reaching overhead.
Engage your legs and core and lengthen through the crown of your head.
source: NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Stretches - Yoga - Mountain Pose)

name: Back Bend
instructions: From mountain pose, place your hands on your lower back for support.
Gently lift your chest and arch backward, keeping the movement controlled.
cautions: Move gently; avoid if you have back-bend-aggravated back pain.
source: NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Stretches - Yoga - Back Bends)

name: Three-Legged Dog
instructions: From downward dog, lift one leg high behind you, keeping your hips as level as possible.
Lengthen through the lifted leg, then switch sides.
source: NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Stretches - Yoga - Three-Legged Dog)

name: Warrior 1
instructions: Step one foot forward into a lunge with the back foot angled out.
Square your hips forward, bend your front knee, and raise your arms overhead.
source: NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Stretches - Yoga - Warrior 1)

name: Warrior 2
instructions: From a wide stance, bend your front knee over your ankle and turn your back foot parallel to the mat's back edge.
Extend your arms out to the sides, parallel to the floor, and gaze over your front hand.
source: NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Stretches - Yoga - Warrior 2)

name: Reverse Warrior
instructions: From warrior 2, keep your front knee bent and reach your front arm up and back overhead.
Rest your back hand lightly on your back leg and lengthen the side body.
source: NOOM Workout Plan PDF (Stretches - Yoga - Reverse Warrior)
